TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kanakanavu, story: kkvNr_domestic_troubles_Muu
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: sua sua iku masin ia sua nganaraku ia Mu'u kisʉʉn Kanakanavu.
S.PHON: sua sua iku masin ia sua ŋanar~ɾaku ia muʔu kisɨɨn kanakanavu.
S.FORM: sua sua iku masin ia sua nganaraku ia Mu'u kisʉʉn Kanakanavu.
S.PHON: sua sua iku masin ia sua ŋanar~ɾaku ia muʔu kisɨɨn kanakanavu.
S.TRANSL: 現在我,我的名字在kanakanavu裡說成Mu'u.
Now I, my name is called Mu'u in Kanakanavu.

S.FORM: sua teku poisua sua makai tanasamia tanasamaku sii marangcikia.
S.PHON: sua teku poisua sua makai tanasamia tanasamaku sii mar~ɾaŋʦikia.
S.FORM: sua teku poisua sua makai tanasamia tanasamaku sii marangcikia.
S.PHON: sua teku poisua sua makai tanasamia tanasamaku sii mar~ɾaŋʦikia.
S.TRANSL: 我要說那個......像是我的家,因為我老了.
I will talk about...like my home, because I become old.

S.FORM: cucuru kan 'unakia manu nakai 'esi namanamarʉ.
S.PHON: ʦuʦur~ɾu kan ʔunakia manu nakai ʔesi namanamar~ɾɨ.
S.FORM: cucuru kan 'unakia manu nakai 'esi namanamarʉ.
S.PHON: ʦuʦur~ɾu kan ʔunakia manu nakai ʔesi namanamar~ɾɨ.
S.TRANSL: 說實在的,我是有小孩,但是在平地.
To be frank, I have children, but they are in the flatland.

S.FORM: 'esi namanamarʉ nakai sua nguan sua mamanumaku ia 'esi takacicin kavavantuku.
S.PHON: ʔesi namanamar~ɾɨ nakai sua ŋuan sua mamanumaku ia ʔesi takaʦiʦin kavavantuku.
S.FORM: 'esi namanamarʉ nakai sua nguan sua mamanumaku ia 'esi takacicin kavavantuku.
S.PHON: ʔesi namanamar~ɾɨ nakai sua ŋuan sua mamanumaku ia ʔesi takaʦiʦin kavavantuku.
S.TRANSL: 在平地,但是他們,我的小孩們,在自己賺錢.

TRANSL.notes: (They are) in the flatland, but they, my children, are making money by themselves.

S.TRANSL: in the flatland, but they, my children, are making money by themselves.

S.FORM: ka'an er ka'an tavarʉ'ʉ movua mamarang pirati'ing sii 'una kavangvang tating.
S.PHON: kaʔan er~ɾ kaʔan tavar~ɾɨʔɨ movua mamar~ɾaŋ pir~ɾatiʔiŋ sii ʔuna kavaŋvaŋ tatiŋ.
S.FORM: ka'an er ka'an tavarʉ'ʉ movua mamarang pirati'ing sii 'una kavangvang tating.
S.PHON: kaʔan er~ɾ kaʔan tavar~ɾɨʔɨ movua mamar~ɾaŋ pir~ɾatiʔiŋ sii ʔuna kavaŋvaŋ tatiŋ.
S.TRANSL: 沒辦法給長輩一點錢,因為都有小孩子了.

TRANSL.notes: (They) cannot give the elderly a little money, because (they) all have children.

S.TRANSL: cannot give the elderly a little money, because all have children.

S.FORM: 'una neci'ire isua ikim masin mata er miciku ia marangcikim.
S.PHON: ʔuna neʦiʔir~ɾe isua ikim masin mata er~ɾ miʦiku ia mar~ɾaŋʦikim.
S.FORM: 'una neci'ire isua ikim masin mata er miciku ia marangcikim.
S.PHON: ʔuna neʦiʔir~ɾe isua ikim masin mata er~ɾ miʦiku ia mar~ɾaŋʦikim.
S.TRANSL: 你看,我現在跟Miciku,我們老了.
See, now I and Miciku get old.

S.FORM: tassa marangcikimi cucuru 'ecikia mamia kan aka paira maa cʉpʉngaku si tecikiae kusa makenanu?
S.PHON: tassa mar~ɾaŋʦikimi ʦuʦur~ɾu ʔeʦikia mamia kan aka pair~ɾa maa ʦɨpɨŋaku si teʦikiae kusa makenanu?
S.FORM: tassa marangcikimi cucuru 'ecikia mamia kan aka paira maa cʉpʉngaku si tecikiae kusa makenanu?
S.PHON: tassa mar~ɾaŋʦikimi ʦuʦur~ɾu ʔeʦikia mamia kan aka pair~ɾa maa ʦɨpɨŋaku si teʦikiae kusa makenanu?
S.TRANSL: 我們兩個都老了,我經常一直很難過.我究竟該怎麼辦呢?

TRANSL.notes: Both of us get old, and I keep being upset often. So what should I do (with that)?

S.TRANSL: Both of us get old, and I keep being upset often. So what should I do ?

S.FORM: tecikia tʉvʉtʉvʉtʉvʉsʉ mamamane.
S.PHON: teʦikia tɨvɨtɨvɨtɨvɨsɨ mamamane.
S.FORM: tecikia tʉvʉtʉvʉtʉvʉsʉ mamamane.
S.PHON: teʦikia tɨvɨtɨvɨtɨvɨsɨ mamamane.

S.FORM: necire kusa tia cumacʉ'ʉra mamanu misaaku mamia pacʉpʉcʉpʉng.
S.PHON: neʦir~ɾe kusa tia ʦumaʦɨʔɨr~ɾa mamanu misaaku mamia paʦɨpɨʦɨpɨŋ.
S.FORM: necire kusa tia cumacʉ'ʉra mamanu misaaku mamia pacʉpʉcʉpʉng.
S.PHON: neʦir~ɾe kusa tia ʦumaʦɨʔɨr~ɾa mamanu misaaku mamia paʦɨpɨʦɨpɨŋ.
S.TRANSL: 我一直在想,究竟誰要看顧我的小孩.
I keep thinking about who on earth is going to take care of my child.

S.FORM: apaco'e nuu monakuin na 'umo'uma ia makasua cʉpʉngaku.
S.PHON: apaʦoʔe nuu monakuin na ʔumoʔuma ia makasua ʦɨpɨŋaku.
S.FORM: apaco'e nuu monakuin na 'umo'uma ia makasua cʉpʉngaku.
S.PHON: apaʦoʔe nuu monakuin na ʔumoʔuma ia makasua ʦɨpɨŋaku.
S.TRANSL: 縱然我是在田裡,我所想的就是那個樣子.
Although I am in the field, what I think about is that way.

S.FORM: carenkiakʉcʉ sii makasia 'akiacu mamarang.
S.PHON: ʦar~ɾenkiakɨʦɨ sii makasia ʔakiaʦu mamar~ɾaŋ.
S.FORM: carenkiakʉcʉ sii makasia 'akiacu mamarang.
S.PHON: ʦar~ɾenkiakɨʦɨ sii makasia ʔakiaʦu mamar~ɾaŋ.

TRANSL.notes: 我很可憐,(因此我得忍耐),因為我父母不在了.

S.TRANSL: 我很可憐, ,因為我父母不在了.

TRANSL.notes: I am poor and therefore (I should bear it), because my parents are already not (alive).

S.TRANSL: I am poor and therefore , because my parents are already not .

S.FORM: koocikia cʉmʉra cumaku koocikia cʉmʉra cinaamaku 'ecikia mamia parʉrʉ'ʉ a.
S.PHON: kooʦikia ʦɨmɨr~ɾa ʦumaku kooʦikia ʦɨmɨr~ɾa ʦinaamaku ʔeʦikia mamia par~ɾɨr~ɾɨʔɨ a.
S.FORM: koocikia cʉmʉra cumaku koocikia cʉmʉra cinaamaku 'ecikia mamia parʉrʉ'ʉ a.
S.PHON: kooʦikia ʦɨmɨr~ɾa ʦumaku kooʦikia ʦɨmɨr~ɾa ʦinaamaku ʔeʦikia mamia par~ɾɨr~ɾɨʔɨ a.
S.TRANSL: 我沒有看到爸爸,我沒有看到媽媽,我只有懷念的份.

TRANSL.notes: I don't see my father, I don't see my mother, I can just only miss (them).

S.TRANSL: I don't see my father, I don't see my mother, I can just only miss .

S.FORM: nimikekiakʉcʉ nanu mia a'aipikia misakia pacʉpʉcʉpʉng.
S.PHON: nimikekiakɨʦɨ nanu mia aʔaipikia misakia paʦɨpɨʦɨpɨŋ.
S.FORM: nimikekiakʉcʉ nanu mia a'aipikia misakia pacʉpʉcʉpʉng.
S.PHON: nimikekiakɨʦɨ nanu mia aʔaipikia misakia paʦɨpɨʦɨpɨŋ.

TRANSL.notes: 我一直那樣想,我從嬰兒開始,是如何(走過這一生的).

S.TRANSL: 我一直那樣想,我從嬰兒開始,是如何 .

TRANSL.notes: I keep think in this way, how (I have spent my life) since babyhood.

S.TRANSL: I keep think in this way, how since babyhood.

S.FORM: imo makasin ia ka'ancikia tavarʉ'ʉ kavavantuku marangcikia.
S.PHON: imo makasin ia kaʔanʦikia tavar~ɾɨʔɨ kavavantuku mar~ɾaŋʦikia.
S.FORM: imo makasin ia ka'ancikia tavarʉ'ʉ kavavantuku marangcikia.
S.PHON: imo makasin ia kaʔanʦikia tavar~ɾɨʔɨ kavavantuku mar~ɾaŋʦikia.
S.TRANSL: 所以我現在不能賺錢,我老了.
Therefore now I can't make money; I am old.

S.FORM: ka'ancikia tavarʉ'ʉ kanupanupasʉ marangcikia.
S.PHON: kaʔanʦikia tavar~ɾɨʔɨ kanupanupasɨ mar~ɾaŋʦikia.
S.FORM: ka'ancikia tavarʉ'ʉ kanupanupasʉ marangcikia.
S.PHON: kaʔanʦikia tavar~ɾɨʔɨ kanupanupasɨ mar~ɾaŋʦikia.
S.TRANSL: 我不能賺錢;我老了.
I can't make money; I am old.

S.FORM: neci'ire er sua Kanakanavu makasi masin ia er ma icuku mamia marang ta marang kisʉʉn.
S.PHON: neʦiʔir~ɾe er~ɾ sua kanakanavu makasi masin ia er~ɾ ma iʦuku mamia mar~ɾaŋ ta mar~ɾaŋ kisɨɨn.
S.FORM: neci'ire er sua Kanakanavu makasi masin ia er ma icuku mamia marang ta marang kisʉʉn.
S.PHON: neʦiʔir~ɾe er~ɾ sua kanakanavu makasi masin ia er~ɾ ma iʦuku mamia mar~ɾaŋ ta mar~ɾaŋ kisɨɨn.
S.TRANSL: 你看,Kanakanavu現在只有我是所謂的最年長的.
You see,in Kanakanavu now only I am the so-called the eldest.

S.FORM: 'esi 'unaken tia sikamanʉng Kanakanavu kaisisi avara'e mamia ia manasʉ pokaripa 'ikua.
S.PHON: ʔesi ʔunaken tia sikamanɨŋ kanakanavu kaisisi avar~ɾaʔe mamia ia manasɨ pokar~ɾipa ʔikua.
S.FORM: 'esi 'unaken tia sikamanʉng Kanakanavu kaisisi avara'e mamia ia manasʉ pokaripa 'ikua.
S.PHON: ʔesi ʔunaken tia sikamanɨŋ kanakanavu kaisisi avar~ɾaʔe mamia ia manasɨ pokar~ɾipa ʔikua.
S.TRANSL: 只要是任何關於Kanakanavu的祭典,一定還要邀請我.

TRANSL.notes: As long as there are any Kanakanavu ceremonies, (they) are sure to invite me.

S.TRANSL: As long as there are any Kanakanavu ceremonies, are sure to invite me.

S.FORM: er 'inanu ikasu cuma Mu'u?
S.PHON: er~ɾ ʔinanu ikasu ʦuma muʔu?
S.FORM: er 'inanu ikasu cuma Mu'u?
S.PHON: er~ɾ ʔinanu ikasu ʦuma muʔu?
S.TRANSL: Mu'u叔叔,你在哪裡?
Uncle Mu'u, where are you?

S.FORM: er ivata sian ikasu tia tapaipecaa kari sii.
S.PHON: er~ɾ ivata sian ikasu tia tapaipeʦaa kar~ɾi sii.
S.FORM: er ivata sian ikasu tia tapaipecaa kari sii.
S.PHON: er~ɾ ivata sian ikasu tia tapaipeʦaa kar~ɾi sii.

TRANSL.notes: 你來這裡,因為要透過你說話(和族人或是祖先).

S.TRANSL: 你來這裡,因為要透過你說話 .

TRANSL.notes: You come here because (we) want talk through you (with the clansmen or ancestors).

S.TRANSL: You come here because want talk through you .

S.FORM: nakai isi ia mamanʉng sii iku nuu 'apatanganaiku tamu kakangca tamvina'ʉ misee ia macangcangarʉ cʉpʉngaku sii necʉ'ʉre.
S.PHON: nakai isi ia mamanɨŋ sii iku nuu ʔapataŋanaiku tamu kakaŋʦa tamvinaʔɨ misee ia maʦaŋʦaŋar~ɾɨ ʦɨpɨŋaku sii neʦɨʔɨr~ɾe.
S.FORM: nakai isi ia mamanʉng sii iku nuu 'apatanganaiku tamu kakangca tamvina'ʉ misee ia macangcangarʉ cʉpʉngaku sii necʉ'ʉre.
S.PHON: nakai isi ia mamanɨŋ sii iku nuu ʔapataŋanaiku tamu kakaŋʦa tamvinaʔɨ misee ia maʦaŋʦaŋar~ɾɨ ʦɨpɨŋaku sii neʦɨʔɨr~ɾe.
S.TRANSL: 但是這是很好的,因為如果透過我來跟上蒼和小米神說話,我的心裡很高興.

TRANSL.notes: But this is good, because if (our people) talk with the god and the god of millet through me, I will be happy in my mind.

S.TRANSL: But this is good, because if talk with the god and the god of millet through me, I will be happy in my mind.

S.FORM: makai kisaa mamarang miana mate'e kitana manu mamanu.
S.PHON: makai kisaa mamar~ɾaŋ miana mateʔe kitana manu mamanu.
S.FORM: makai kisaa mamarang miana mate'e kitana manu mamanu.
S.PHON: makai kisaa mamar~ɾaŋ miana mateʔe kitana manu mamanu.

TRANSL.notes: 就像以前老人家所說的,(部落的傳統)留給我們這些後代.

S.TRANSL: 就像以前老人家所說的, 留給我們這些後代.

TRANSL.notes: Like what the old people said in the past, (the tribal traditions) were passed down to us children.

S.TRANSL: Like what the old people said in the past, were passed down to us children.

S.FORM: ikam maman ia 'akun aka cʉpʉng.
S.PHON: ikam maman ia ʔakun aka ʦɨpɨŋ.
S.FORM: ikam maman ia 'akun aka cʉpʉng.
S.PHON: ikam maman ia ʔakun aka ʦɨpɨŋ.
S.TRANSL: 你們後代阿,心裡不要難過.
You offspring, do not worry.

S.FORM: caniara noo kumareekam vina'ʉ.
S.PHON: ʦaniar~ɾa noo kumar~ɾeekam vinaʔɨ.
S.FORM: caniara noo kumareekam vina'ʉ.
S.PHON: ʦaniar~ɾa noo kumar~ɾeekam vinaʔɨ.
S.TRANSL: 如果你們種植小米...
If you plant the millet...

S.FORM: nimerivina'ʉcukamu ia sua vina'ʉ ia umʉkʉʉncukamu vian'ʉ ia.
S.PHON: nimer~ɾivinaʔɨʦukamu ia sua vinaʔɨ ia umɨkɨɨnʦukamu vianʔɨ ia.
S.FORM: nimerivina'ʉcukamu ia sua vina'ʉ ia umʉkʉʉncukamu vian'ʉ ia.
S.PHON: nimer~ɾivinaʔɨʦukamu ia sua vinaʔɨ ia umɨkɨɨnʦukamu vianʔɨ ia.
S.TRANSL: 你們收割小米了呢,小米呢,你們把小米種植了...
You harvested millet, the millet… you planted the millet …

S.FORM: mak macʉpʉcʉpʉngcu mamia manasʉ tecukam mon na cakʉrʉ kaisisi.
S.PHON: mak maʦɨpɨʦɨpɨŋʦu mamia manasɨ teʦukam mon na ʦakɨr~ɾɨ kaisisi.
S.FORM: mak macʉpʉcʉpʉngcu mamia manasʉ tecukam mon na cakʉrʉ kaisisi.
S.PHON: mak maʦɨpɨʦɨpɨŋʦu mamia manasɨ teʦukam mon na ʦakɨr~ɾɨ kaisisi.

TRANSL.notes: 就只要去想(了)...你們或許就要在聚會所祭祀了.

S.TRANSL: 就只要去想 ...你們或許就要在聚會所祭祀了.
Only remember…You may be about to worship ancestors in the chamber.

S.FORM: mikoo kisaa mamarang sii 'ecu tia marivina'ʉ.
S.PHON: mikoo kisaa mamar~ɾaŋ sii ʔeʦu tia mar~ɾivinaʔɨ.
S.FORM: mikoo kisaa mamarang sii 'ecu tia marivina'ʉ.
S.PHON: mikoo kisaa mamar~ɾaŋ sii ʔeʦu tia mar~ɾivinaʔɨ.
S.TRANSL: 老人家所說的米貢,因為已經要收割小米了.
What the elder call 'MIKOON', because we are already going to harvest the millet.

S.FORM: ka'anpa aka cʉpʉng sua isua.
S.PHON: kaʔanpa aka ʦɨpɨŋ sua isua.
S.FORM: ka'anpa aka cʉpʉng sua isua.
S.PHON: kaʔanpa aka ʦɨpɨŋ sua isua.
S.TRANSL: 那個心裡還不會難過.
That, will not be sad yet.

S.FORM: imoo misaaku mamia sua ikita kanakanavu ia sua katatamu misee ia 'akun sua masi'upupang.
S.PHON: imoo misaaku mamia sua ikita kanakanavu ia sua katatamu misee ia ʔakun sua masiʔupupaŋ.
S.FORM: imoo misaaku mamia sua ikita kanakanavu ia sua katatamu misee ia 'akun sua masi'upupang.
S.PHON: imoo misaaku mamia sua ikita kanakanavu ia sua katatamu misee ia ʔakun sua masiʔupupaŋ.

TRANSL.notes: 所以我只有說,我們卡那卡那富人呢,所謂的祭酒呢,不可以亂說(祭詞).

S.TRANSL: 所以我只有說,我們卡那卡那富人呢,所謂的祭酒呢,不可以亂說 .

TRANSL.notes: So I just say, we Kanakanavu people, the so-called libation, (one) cannot say (prayers) casually.

S.TRANSL: So I just say, we Kanakanavu people, the so-called libation, cannot say casually.

S.FORM: sua ka'an tavarʉ'ʉ pokarikari ia 'akun mamia pokarikari.
S.PHON: sua kaʔan tavar~ɾɨʔɨ pokar~ɾikar~ɾi ia ʔakun mamia pokar~ɾikar~ɾi.
S.FORM: sua ka'an tavarʉ'ʉ pokarikari ia 'akun mamia pokarikari.
S.PHON: sua kaʔan tavar~ɾɨʔɨ pokar~ɾikar~ɾi ia ʔakun mamia pokar~ɾikar~ɾi.

TRANSL.notes: 不會說(祭詞)(的人),就不要說話.

S.TRANSL: 不會說 ,就不要說話.
Those who don't know how to say, don't speak then.

S.FORM: tia kari ucanen maamia sua karimusu.
S.PHON: tia kar~ɾi uʦanen maamia sua kar~ɾimusu.
S.FORM: tia kari ucanen maamia sua karimusu.
S.PHON: tia kar~ɾi uʦanen maamia sua kar~ɾimusu.

TRANSL.notes: 你要說的(祭詞)只有一句.

S.TRANSL: 你要說的 只有一句.
What you will say is only one sentence.

S.FORM: tamoo amancukasu mamarang misee mamia 'akun sua 'una kari noo katatamukita noo 'unakiten kari aka ia sii sua tavara'a mamia.
S.PHON: tamoo amanʦukasu mamar~ɾaŋ misee mamia ʔakun sua ʔuna kar~ɾi noo katatamukita noo ʔunakiten kar~ɾi aka ia sii sua tavar~ɾaʔa mamia.
S.FORM: tamoo amancukasu mamarang misee mamia 'akun sua 'una kari noo katatamukita noo 'unakiten kari aka ia sii sua tavara'a mamia.
S.PHON: tamoo amanʦukasu mamar~ɾaŋ misee mamia ʔakun sua ʔuna kar~ɾi noo katatamukita noo ʔunakiten kar~ɾi aka ia sii sua tavar~ɾaʔa mamia.

TRANSL.notes: 祖先阿,我們祭酒的時候,我們若有不好的話,因為(大家)要謹記.

S.TRANSL: 祖先阿,我們祭酒的時候,我們若有不好的話,因為 要謹記.
Our ancestors! When we libate, if we have bad prayers.

S.FORM: necʉre.
S.PHON: neʦɨr~ɾe.
S.FORM: necʉre.
S.PHON: neʦɨr~ɾe.
S.TRANSL: 你看!
Look!

S.FORM: noo tecikita kaisisi ia kan 'esicu tinpurupuru nia cakʉrʉ via aririan kitana.
S.PHON: noo teʦikita kaisisi ia kan ʔesiʦu tinpur~ɾupur~ɾu nia ʦakɨr~ɾɨ via ar~ɾir~ɾian kitana.
S.FORM: noo tecikita kaisisi ia kan 'esicu tinpurupuru nia cakʉrʉ via aririan kitana.
S.PHON: noo teʦikita kaisisi ia kan ʔesiʦu tinpur~ɾupur~ɾu nia ʦakɨr~ɾɨ via ar~ɾir~ɾian kitana.

TRANSL.notes: 當我們要祭祀了,(所有人)都已經坐在聚會所那裏,注意聽我們(的話).

S.TRANSL: 當我們要祭祀了, 都已經坐在聚會所那裏,注意聽我們 .

TRANSL.notes: When we are going to worship, (all the people) are sitting there in the chamber.

S.TRANSL: When we are going to worship, are sitting there in the chamber.

S.FORM: AH makanan tia s tekita cumacʉ'ʉra mamanmita sikaisisi mamanmita makan matʉa maka mataa sikaisisita mamarang.
S.PHON: ah makanan tia s tekita ʦumaʦɨʔɨr~ɾa mamanmita sikaisisi mamanmita makan matɨa maka mataa sikaisisita mamar~ɾaŋ.
S.FORM: AH makanan tia s tekita cumacʉ'ʉra mamanmita sikaisisi mamanmita makan matʉa maka mataa sikaisisita mamarang.
S.PHON: ah makanan tia s tekita ʦumaʦɨʔɨr~ɾa mamanmita sikaisisi mamanmita makan matɨa maka mataa sikaisisita mamar~ɾaŋ.

TRANSL.notes: 要怎樣(祭祀)呢,我們要看我們後代祭祀的方式和老一輩的人究竟是否一樣.

S.TRANSL: 要怎樣 呢,我們要看我們後代祭祀的方式和老一輩的人究竟是否一樣.
How to worship ancestors ? We will see if the way our offspring worship is the same as the way the elderly did.

S.FORM: misee AH mamarangmita.
S.PHON: misee ah mamar~ɾaŋmita.
S.FORM: misee AH mamarangmita.
S.PHON: misee ah mamar~ɾaŋmita.

TRANSL.notes: 我們祖先會說,和我們祖先祭祀的方式(包括祭詞/動作)相同嗎?

S.TRANSL: 我們祖先會說,和我們祖先祭祀的方式 相同嗎?
Our ancestors will say that, is it the same as the way our ancestors worshiped?

S.FORM: imooku misee sua mokusakita cakʉrʉ ia 'akun masipupang.
S.PHON: imooku misee sua mokusakita ʦakɨr~ɾɨ ia ʔakun masipupaŋ.
S.FORM: imooku misee sua mokusakita cakʉrʉ ia 'akun masipupang.
S.PHON: imooku misee sua mokusakita ʦakɨr~ɾɨ ia ʔakun masipupaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 所以我說,我們去聚會所呢,不要亂說話.

TRANSL.notes: So I say, when we go to the chamber, (we) do not speak casually.

S.TRANSL: So I say, when we go to the chamber, do not speak casually.

S.FORM: sua ka'an tavarʉ'ʉ pokarikari ia tamoo kisaa mamia.
S.PHON: sua kaʔan tavar~ɾɨʔɨ pokar~ɾikar~ɾi ia tamoo kisaa mamia.
S.FORM: sua ka'an tavarʉ'ʉ pokarikari ia tamoo kisaa mamia.
S.PHON: sua kaʔan tavar~ɾɨʔɨ pokar~ɾikar~ɾi ia tamoo kisaa mamia.

TRANSL.notes: 不會說(祭詞)的(人),只要說「tamoo」.

S.TRANSL: 不會說 的 ,只要說「tamoo」.
Those who don't know how to say just say 'tamoo'.

S.FORM: nguaci sua kari hua.
S.PHON: ŋuaʦi sua kar~ɾi hua.
S.FORM: nguaci sua kari hua.
S.PHON: ŋuaʦi sua kar~ɾi hua.

TRANSL.notes: 只有那句(講完就結束的意思).

S.TRANSL: 只有那句 .
Only that word.

S.FORM: necʉre kan 'unakita 'e na Kanakanavu pʉ'ʉpʉ kanakanavu i masiupupang noo katatamukita cakʉrʉ.
S.PHON: neʦɨr~ɾe kan ʔunakita ʔe na kanakanavu pɨʔɨpɨ kanakanavu i masiupupaŋ noo katatamukita ʦakɨr~ɾɨ.
S.FORM: necʉre kan 'unakita 'e na Kanakanavu pʉ'ʉpʉ kanakanavu i masiupupang noo katatamukita cakʉrʉ.
S.PHON: neʦɨr~ɾe kan ʔunakita ʔe na kanakanavu pɨʔɨpɨ kanakanavu i masiupupaŋ noo katatamukita ʦakɨr~ɾɨ.

TRANSL.notes: 你看,我們有在…我們這些遺留下來的knv(人) ,當我們在為聚會所祭酒的時候,隨便說話…

S.TRANSL: 你看,我們有在…我們這些遺留下來的knv ,當我們在為聚會所祭酒的時候,隨便說話…

TRANSL.notes: You see, we have in… we the remaining Kanakanavu people, when we libate in the chamber, (we) say the prayers casually…

S.TRANSL: You see, we have in… we the remaining Kanakanavu people, when we libate in the chamber, say the prayers casually…

S.FORM: necʉ'ʉre 'unakita araaka.
S.PHON: neʦɨʔɨr~ɾe ʔunakita ar~ɾaaka.
S.FORM: necʉ'ʉre 'unakita araaka.
S.PHON: neʦɨʔɨr~ɾe ʔunakita ar~ɾaaka.

TRANSL.notes: 你看,我們有(人)去世.

S.TRANSL: 你看,我們有 去世.
You see, we have some people who passed away.

S.FORM: m aʉ 'aka sua tina'anin.
S.PHON: m aɨ ʔaka sua tinaʔanin.
S.FORM: m aʉ 'aka sua tina'anin.
S.PHON: m aɨ ʔaka sua tinaʔanin.

TRANSL.notes: (有人)他的身體不好.

S.TRANSL: 他的身體不好.
Some are in bad physical condition.

S.FORM: ka'an mamanʉng si'icʉpin.
S.PHON: kaʔan mamanɨŋ siʔiʦɨpin.
S.FORM: ka'an mamanʉng si'icʉpin.
S.PHON: kaʔan mamanɨŋ siʔiʦɨpin.

TRANSL.notes: 他睡不好(隱喻為他運氣不好).

S.TRANSL: 他睡不好 .

TRANSL.notes: He does not sleep well. (MET. He has bad luck)

S.TRANSL: He does not sleep well.

S.FORM: sipʉcʉcʉpin sua makasua sua.
S.PHON: sipɨʦɨʦɨpin sua makasua sua.
S.FORM: sipʉcʉcʉpin sua makasua sua.
S.PHON: sipɨʦɨʦɨpin sua makasua sua.
S.TRANSL: 他的運氣就像那樣啊.

TRANSL.notes: His (bad) luck is like that.

S.TRANSL: His luck is like that.

S.FORM: oh ka'an masimanʉngʉn mon na cakʉrʉ.
S.PHON: oh kaʔan masimanɨŋɨn mon na ʦakɨr~ɾɨ.
S.FORM: oh ka'an masimanʉngʉn mon na cakʉrʉ.
S.PHON: oh kaʔan masimanɨŋɨn mon na ʦakɨr~ɾɨ.

TRANSL.notes: 在聚會所沒有好好(正確地)地說(祭詞).

S.TRANSL: 在聚會所沒有好好 地說 .
The prayers are not said in the right way in the chamber.

S.FORM: imoo pairaku makasua noo 'unakuin.
S.PHON: imoo pair~ɾaku makasua noo ʔunakuin.
S.FORM: imoo pairaku makasua noo 'unakuin.
S.PHON: imoo pair~ɾaku makasua noo ʔunakuin.

TRANSL.notes: 所以我常像那樣,若我有(時間/有空).

S.TRANSL: 所以我常像那樣,若我有 .
So I'm often like that, if I have time.

S.FORM: noo kaisisikita ia matacuvucuvungkita ia manasʉku paira pu'una kari kamua.
S.PHON: noo kaisisikita ia mataʦuvuʦuvuŋkita ia manasɨku pair~ɾa puʔuna kar~ɾi kamua.
S.FORM: noo kaisisikita ia matacuvucuvungkita ia manasʉku paira pu'una kari kamua.
S.PHON: noo kaisisikita ia mataʦuvuʦuvuŋkita ia manasɨku pair~ɾa puʔuna kar~ɾi kamua.

TRANSL.notes: 當我們祭祀的時候(之前),我們召集族人聚在一起,我常一定有話先跟你們說.

S.TRANSL: 當我們祭祀的時候 ,我們召集族人聚在一起,我常一定有話先跟你們說.
When we worship, we gather together and I often will something to tell you first.

S.FORM: aah mamanu 'akunen masipupang katatamukamu.
S.PHON: aah mamanu ʔakunen masipupaŋ katatamukamu.
S.FORM: aah mamanu 'akunen masipupang katatamukamu.
S.PHON: aah mamanu ʔakunen masipupaŋ katatamukamu.

TRANSL.notes: 哎呀,孩子們,你們祭酒不要隨便(亂)說(祭詞).

S.TRANSL: 哎呀,孩子們,你們祭酒不要隨便 說 .
Ah, children! Don't say the prayers casually when you libate.

S.FORM: masimanʉnga sua ka'an tavarʉ'ʉ pokarikari ia 'akun maa pokarikari misaaku.
S.PHON: masimanɨŋa sua kaʔan tavar~ɾɨʔɨ pokar~ɾikar~ɾi ia ʔakun maa pokar~ɾikar~ɾi misaaku.
S.FORM: masimanʉnga sua ka'an tavarʉ'ʉ pokarikari ia 'akun maa pokarikari misaaku.
S.PHON: masimanɨŋa sua kaʔan tavar~ɾɨʔɨ pokar~ɾikar~ɾi ia ʔakun maa pokar~ɾikar~ɾi misaaku.

TRANSL.notes: 我(就常)說,不會說(祭詞)的就不要說話.

S.TRANSL: 我 說,不會說 的就不要說話.
Those who don't know how to say don't speak then, I say.

S.FORM: mataa ucani ia.
S.PHON: mataa uʦani ia.
S.FORM: mataa ucani ia.
S.PHON: mataa uʦani ia.

TRANSL.notes: (另外有)一件.

S.TRANSL: 一件.
There's another thing.

S.FORM: caniava noo makai mikong kita kaisisi ia cucuru makai uh ak sua ikita mamisa ia 'esicikita mamia umara mamia nganee seehu seehu miseekita mamia.
S.PHON: ʦaniava noo makai mikoŋ kita kaisisi ia ʦuʦur~ɾu makai uh ak sua ikita mamisa ia ʔesiʦikita mamia umar~ɾa mamia ŋanee seehu seehu miseekita mamia.
S.FORM: caniava noo makai mikong kita kaisisi ia cucuru makai uh ak sua ikita mamisa ia 'esicikita mamia umara mamia nganee seehu seehu miseekita mamia.
S.PHON: ʦaniava noo makai mikoŋ kita kaisisi ia ʦuʦur~ɾu makai uh ak sua ikita mamisa ia ʔesiʦikita mamia umar~ɾa mamia ŋanee seehu seehu miseekita mamia.

TRANSL.notes: 若是像米貢祭,我們(舉行)米貢祭(的時候),我們只是說,我們最近(近年來)只是在拿政府的名稱(名義)(來辦祭典)而已.

S.TRANSL: 若是像米貢祭,我們 米貢祭 ,我們只是說,我們最近 只是在拿政府的名稱 而已.
Like Mikong, when we have the Mikong Festival, we only say that recently we celebrate it merely for the sake of the government.

S.FORM: cucuru sua mamarang mita miana ia ka'an tavarʉ'ʉ 'apacʉ'ʉra pakisia noo kaisisi.
S.PHON: ʦuʦur~ɾu sua mamar~ɾaŋ mita miana ia kaʔan tavar~ɾɨʔɨ ʔapaʦɨʔɨr~ɾa pakisia noo kaisisi.
S.FORM: cucuru sua mamarang mita miana ia ka'an tavarʉ'ʉ 'apacʉ'ʉra pakisia noo kaisisi.
S.PHON: ʦuʦur~ɾu sua mamar~ɾaŋ mita miana ia kaʔan tavar~ɾɨʔɨ ʔapaʦɨʔɨr~ɾa pakisia noo kaisisi.

TRANSL.notes: 我們的老人家祭祀的時候真的不可以讓講閩南話的人看(米貢祭).

S.TRANSL: 我們的老人家祭祀的時候真的不可以讓講閩南話的人看 .

TRANSL.notes: Our ancestors indeed would not let Taiwanese-speaking people see (Mikong) when worshiping.

S.TRANSL: Our ancestors indeed would not let Taiwanese-speaking people see when worshiping.

S.FORM: ka'an tavarʉ'ʉ 'apivatu na tapininga cakʉrʉ.
S.PHON: kaʔan tavar~ɾɨʔɨ ʔapivatu na tapiniŋa ʦakɨr~ɾɨ.
S.FORM: ka'an tavarʉ'ʉ 'apivatu na tapininga cakʉrʉ.
S.PHON: kaʔan tavar~ɾɨʔɨ ʔapivatu na tapiniŋa ʦakɨr~ɾɨ.
S.TRANSL: 絕對不讓來到聚會所的廣場.

S.FORM: uh matarava mamia noo nikaisisicikita makai vina'ʉ.
S.PHON: uh matar~ɾava mamia noo nikaisisiʦikita makai vinaʔɨ.
S.FORM: uh matarava mamia noo nikaisisicikita makai vina'ʉ.
S.PHON: uh matar~ɾava mamia noo nikaisisiʦikita makai vinaʔɨ.
S.TRANSL: 只有到我們已經祭祀過了的時候,像小米的祭祀.
Only when we finish worshiping, like millet.

S.FORM: uh tumin coca'ania ia tavarʉ'ʉcikita pakisia makari ah tekamu iovutu patara'aningo ia ivataacu.
S.PHON: uh tumin ʦoʦaʔania ia tavar~ɾɨʔɨʦikita pakisia makar~ɾi ah tekamu iovutu patar~ɾaʔaniŋo ia ivataaʦu.
S.FORM: uh tumin coca'ania ia tavarʉ'ʉcikita pakisia makari ah tekamu iovutu patara'aningo ia ivataacu.
S.PHON: uh tumin ʦoʦaʔania ia tavar~ɾɨʔɨʦikita pakisia makar~ɾi ah tekamu iovutu patar~ɾaʔaniŋo ia ivataaʦu.

TRANSL.notes: 若完成了進行懸掛午餐的(儀式),可以跟閩南人說:你們(若)要來(的話),(可以)來了.

S.TRANSL: 若完成了進行懸掛午餐的 ,可以跟閩南人說:你們 要來 , 來了.
If we finish hanging up the lunch, we can tell the Chinese people: 'If you want to come, now you can.'

S.FORM: tavarʉ'ʉn makasua pakisia.
S.PHON: tavar~ɾɨʔɨn makasua pakisia.
S.FORM: tavarʉ'ʉn makasua pakisia.
S.PHON: tavar~ɾɨʔɨn makasua pakisia.
S.TRANSL: 我們可以這樣對待閩南人.
We can treat the Chinese-speaking people that way.

S.FORM: imo ikita Kanakanavu kan sikaisisimita ia aka makaa maraa aka sii.
S.PHON: imo ikita kanakanavu kan sikaisisimita ia aka makaa mar~ɾaa aka sii.
S.FORM: imo ikita Kanakanavu kan sikaisisimita ia aka makaa maraa aka sii.
S.PHON: imo ikita kanakanavu kan sikaisisimita ia aka makaa mar~ɾaa aka sii.
S.TRANSL: 所以我們卡那卡那富祭祀的方式比較不好,因為…
So the way we worship is not good, is worse, because…

S.FORM: iavutucu ma kitana pakisia uh aratʉm aratʉm aratʉm mamia.
S.PHON: iavutuʦu ma kitana pakisia uh ar~ɾatɨm ar~ɾatɨm ar~ɾatɨm mamia.
S.FORM: iavutucu ma kitana pakisia uh aratʉm aratʉm aratʉm mamia.
S.PHON: iavutuʦu ma kitana pakisia uh ar~ɾatɨm ar~ɾatɨm ar~ɾatɨm mamia.

TRANSL.notes: 平地人直接到我們這裡(祭祀的場所),只是突然間冒出來冒出來.

S.TRANSL: 平地人直接到我們這裡 ,只是突然間冒出來冒出來.
The Chinese people came straight to our place, and they just showed up.

S.FORM: ka'ancikita tavarʉ'ʉ kaisisi.
S.PHON: kaʔanʦikita tavar~ɾɨʔɨ kaisisi.
S.FORM: ka'ancikita tavarʉ'ʉ kaisisi.
S.PHON: kaʔanʦikita tavar~ɾɨʔɨ kaisisi.
S.TRANSL: 我們就無法進行儀式了.
We couldn't proceed our worshiping.

S.FORM: isua sua kan hayab m maka hayab.
S.PHON: isua sua kan haja* m maka haja*.
S.FORM: isua sua kan hayab m maka hayab.
S.PHON: isua sua kan haja* m maka haja*.
S.TRANSL: 那就是…比較會…
That is…more…

S.FORM: makanan kusai secu'urakitana tamu kakangca tamvina'ʉ.
S.PHON: makanan kusai seʦuʔur~ɾakitana tamu kakaŋʦa tamvinaʔɨ.
S.FORM: makanan kusai secu'urakitana tamu kakangca tamvina'ʉ.
S.PHON: makanan kusai seʦuʔur~ɾakitana tamu kakaŋʦa tamvinaʔɨ.
S.TRANSL: 究竟我們在天上的祖先還有小米的祖先會怎樣看待我們.
How exactly would our ancestors and the god of millet see us?

S.FORM: sii makasuakita 'esipikita mamia tia matacuvucuvung makarikari.
S.PHON: sii makasuakita ʔesipikita mamia tia mataʦuvuʦuvuŋ makar~ɾikar~ɾi.
S.FORM: sii makasuakita 'esipikita mamia tia matacuvucuvung makarikari.
S.PHON: sii makasuakita ʔesipikita mamia tia mataʦuvuʦuvuŋ makar~ɾikar~ɾi.
S.TRANSL: 因為我們像那樣,我們還只是在一起討論當中.
Because we are like that, we're still gathering together, discussing.

S.FORM: 'esici nia pakisia kuratumuru mamia.
S.PHON: ʔesiʦi nia pakisia kur~ɾatumur~ɾu mamia.
S.FORM: 'esici nia pakisia kuratumuru mamia.
S.PHON: ʔesiʦi nia pakisia kur~ɾatumur~ɾu mamia.
S.TRANSL: 平地人就已經在那裏佔得滿滿的.
The Chinese people were just everywhere.

S.FORM: tekita manan mangarigari.
S.PHON: tekita manan maŋar~ɾi*ar~ɾi.
S.FORM: tekita manan mangarigari.
S.PHON: tekita manan maŋar~ɾi*ar~ɾi.
S.TRANSL: 我們要怎樣活動?
How do we proceed?

S.FORM: sii sua taniara soni ia 'esiku sian.
S.PHON: sii sua taniar~ɾa soni ia ʔesiku sian.
S.FORM: sii sua taniara soni ia 'esiku sian.
S.PHON: sii sua taniar~ɾa soni ia ʔesiku sian.
S.TRANSL: 因為今天是…我在這裡.
Because today… I'm here.

S.FORM: 'esiku pokarikari.
S.PHON: ʔesiku pokar~ɾikar~ɾi.
S.FORM: 'esiku pokarikari.
S.PHON: ʔesiku pokar~ɾikar~ɾi.
S.TRANSL: 我在說話.
I'm speaking.

S.FORM: po'ʉ'ʉna po'isua sua uh tanasamaku sii.
S.PHON: poʔɨʔɨna poʔisua sua uh tanasamaku sii.
S.FORM: po'ʉ'ʉna po'isua sua uh tanasamaku sii.
S.PHON: poʔɨʔɨna poʔisua sua uh tanasamaku sii.
S.TRANSL: 說故事…說那個…我的家,因為…
Tell stories about the… my home, because…

S.FORM: aaka sua aakaci cʉpʉngaku sii marangcikia.
S.PHON: aaka sua aakaʦi ʦɨpɨŋaku sii mar~ɾaŋʦikia.
S.FORM: aaka sua aakaci cʉpʉngaku sii marangcikia.
S.PHON: aaka sua aakaʦi ʦɨpɨŋaku sii mar~ɾaŋʦikia.
S.TRANSL: 我已經很難過,因為…我年紀大了.
I already feel sad because…I become old.

S.FORM: kancikia tavarʉ'ʉ kanupanupasʉ.
S.PHON: kanʦikia tavar~ɾɨʔɨ kanupanupasɨ.
S.FORM: kancikia tavarʉ'ʉ kanupanupasʉ.
S.PHON: kanʦikia tavar~ɾɨʔɨ kanupanupasɨ.
S.TRANSL: 我已經不能賺錢.
I'm already unable to earn money.

S.FORM: akiacu kʉna kamʉcʉ.
S.PHON: akiaʦu kɨna kamɨʦɨ.
S.FORM: akiacu kʉna kamʉcʉ.
S.PHON: akiaʦu kɨna kamɨʦɨ.
S.TRANSL: 連食物都沒有.
Let alone food.

S.FORM: vʉra.
S.PHON: vɨr~ɾa.
S.FORM: vʉra.
S.PHON: vɨr~ɾa.
S.TRANSL: 連米也沒有.

TRANSL.notes: (No) rice.

S.TRANSL: rice.

S.FORM: kani 'ecikia mamia purusʉsʉ'ʉ mamia taniara.
S.PHON: kani ʔeʦikia mamia pur~ɾusɨsɨʔɨ mamia taniar~ɾa.
S.FORM: kani 'ecikia mamia purusʉsʉ'ʉ mamia taniara.
S.PHON: kani ʔeʦikia mamia pur~ɾusɨsɨʔɨ mamia taniar~ɾa.
S.TRANSL: 我每天只有唉聲嘆氣.
I simply sigh every day.

S.FORM: paira aaka cʉpʉngaku sii iki mata miciku ia marangcikimi.
S.PHON: pair~ɾa aaka ʦɨpɨŋaku sii iki mata miʦiku ia mar~ɾaŋʦikimi.
S.FORM: paira aaka cʉpʉngaku sii iki mata miciku ia marangcikimi.
S.PHON: pair~ɾa aaka ʦɨpɨŋaku sii iki mata miʦiku ia mar~ɾaŋʦikimi.
S.TRANSL: 我常常很難過因為我和Miciku都老了.
I often feel sad because I and Miciku have become old.

S.FORM: ka'ancikia tavarʉ putukikio.
S.PHON: kaʔanʦikia tavar~ɾɨ putukikio.
S.FORM: ka'ancikia tavarʉ putukikio.
S.PHON: kaʔanʦikia tavar~ɾɨ putukikio.
S.TRANSL: 我們已經不能工作了.
We're already unable to work.

S.FORM: 'unakim manu misaakam cau nakai.
S.PHON: ʔunakim manu misaakam ʦau nakai.
S.FORM: 'unakim manu misaakam cau nakai.
S.PHON: ʔunakim manu misaakam ʦau nakai.
S.TRANSL: 你們說我們是有小孩子的人,但是…
You say that I'm one who has a child, but…

S.FORM: sua manumaku ia uh takacicin kangvang 'esi namanamarʉ putikikio namanamarʉ.
S.PHON: sua manumaku ia uh takaʦiʦin kaŋvaŋ ʔesi namanamar~ɾɨ putikikio namanamar~ɾɨ.
S.FORM: sua manumaku ia uh takacicin kangvang 'esi namanamarʉ putikikio namanamarʉ.
S.PHON: sua manumaku ia uh takaʦiʦin kaŋvaŋ ʔesi namanamar~ɾɨ putikikio namanamar~ɾɨ.
S.TRANSL: 但是我的小孩都在平地,在平地工作.
But my children are all working in the city.

S.FORM: tekam makasua sua sia situturuamaku kamua.
S.PHON: tekam makasua sua sia situtur~ɾuamaku kamua.
S.FORM: tekam makasua sua sia situturuamaku kamua.
S.PHON: tekam makasua sua sia situtur~ɾuamaku kamua.
S.TRANSL: 我用以告訴你們的是那樣.
I use that to tell you.

S.FORM: noo tumanakamu kari iisi ia sua kanang ia kan mana tia paiee.
S.PHON: noo tumanakamu kar~ɾi iisi ia sua kanaŋ ia kan mana tia paiee.
S.FORM: noo tumanakamu kari iisi ia sua kanang ia kan mana tia paiee.
S.PHON: noo tumanakamu kar~ɾi iisi ia sua kanaŋ ia kan mana tia paiee.
S.TRANSL: 如果你們聽到這些話,聽得懂的人或許會後悔.
If you hear these words, those who understand will probably regret.

S.FORM: ah cucuruana Cuma Mu'u ia kari Cuma Mu'u ia 'esi pomanʉngʉ.
S.PHON: ah ʦuʦur~ɾuana ʦuma muʔu ia kar~ɾi ʦuma muʔu ia ʔesi pomanɨŋɨ.
S.FORM: ah cucuruana Cuma Mu'u ia kari Cuma Mu'u ia 'esi pomanʉngʉ.
S.PHON: ah ʦuʦur~ɾuana ʦuma muʔu ia kar~ɾi ʦuma muʔu ia ʔesi pomanɨŋɨ.
S.TRANSL: Mu'u叔叔說的話真的是...說得很明白.
Uncle Mu'u's words are really clear.

S.FORM: caren curu sii marangcu.
S.PHON: ʦar~ɾen ʦur~ɾu sii mar~ɾaŋʦu.
S.FORM: caren curu sii marangcu.
S.PHON: ʦar~ɾen ʦur~ɾu sii mar~ɾaŋʦu.
S.TRANSL: 真的很可憐,因為年長了.
It's really pathetic, because I'm old.

S.FORM: kancikia tavarʉu kanupanupasʉ.
S.PHON: kanʦikia tavar~ɾɨu kanupanupasɨ.
S.FORM: kancikia tavarʉu kanupanupasʉ.
S.PHON: kanʦikia tavar~ɾɨu kanupanupasɨ.
S.TRANSL: 我已經沒辦法賺錢了.
I'm already unable to make money.

S.FORM: kancikia tavarʉ'ʉ kipapa cau kanupanupasʉ.
S.PHON: kanʦikia tavar~ɾɨʔɨ kipapa ʦau kanupanupasɨ.
S.FORM: kancikia tavarʉ'ʉ kipapa cau kanupanupasʉ.
S.PHON: kanʦikia tavar~ɾɨʔɨ kipapa ʦau kanupanupasɨ.
S.TRANSL: 我已經不能跟著別人去賺錢.
I'm already unable to follow people and make money.

S.FORM: 'esicikia mamia tinpuru mamia parʉrʉ'ʉ mamia.
S.PHON: ʔesiʦikia mamia tinpur~ɾu mamia par~ɾɨr~ɾɨʔɨ mamia.
S.FORM: 'esicikia mamia tinpuru mamia parʉrʉ'ʉ mamia.
S.PHON: ʔesiʦikia mamia tinpur~ɾu mamia par~ɾɨr~ɾɨʔɨ mamia.
S.TRANSL: 我們只能坐著,只能懷念.

TRANSL.notes: We just sit here, and recollect (the past).

S.TRANSL: We just sit here, and recollect .

S.FORM: tecikiei mosa makananu.
S.PHON: teʦikiei mosa makananu.
S.FORM: tecikiei mosa makananu.
S.PHON: teʦikiei mosa makananu.
S.TRANSL: 我要去哪裡…
Where do I go…

S.FORM: ka'ancikia sipisipi taniara ia tecikiei mosa makananu manmanmaku.
S.PHON: kaʔanʦikia sipisipi taniar~ɾa ia teʦikiei mosa makananu manmanmaku.
S.FORM: ka'ancikia sipisipi taniara ia tecikiei mosa makananu manmanmaku.
S.PHON: kaʔanʦikia sipisipi taniar~ɾa ia teʦikiei mosa makananu manmanmaku.
S.TRANSL: 我的日子不會SIPISIPI,究竟我的孩子怎麼辦?
My days are not SIPISIPI, then what exactly should our children do?

S.FORM: pacʉpʉngcʉpʉng misaaku mamia pacʉpʉngcʉpʉng sua karimaku tumaturu kamua ia manasʉ matarava mamia nesi.
S.PHON: paʦɨpɨŋʦɨpɨŋ misaaku mamia paʦɨpɨŋʦɨpɨŋ sua kar~ɾimaku tumatur~ɾu kamua ia manasɨ matar~ɾava mamia nesi.
S.FORM: pacʉpʉngcʉpʉng misaaku mamia pacʉpʉngcʉpʉng sua karimaku tumaturu kamua ia manasʉ matarava mamia nesi.
S.PHON: paʦɨpɨŋʦɨpɨŋ misaaku mamia paʦɨpɨŋʦɨpɨŋ sua kar~ɾimaku tumatur~ɾu kamua ia manasɨ matar~ɾava mamia nesi.
S.TRANSL: 我心裡就想說,我所告訴你們的話或許就到此結束.
I think, what I want to tell you ends here.

S.FORM: pacʉpʉngcʉpʉngo makas(ua) sua na va sua kariin.
S.PHON: paʦɨpɨŋʦɨpɨŋo makas(ua) sua na va sua kar~ɾiin.
S.FORM: pacʉpʉngcʉpʉngo makas(ua) sua na va sua kariin.
S.PHON: paʦɨpɨŋʦɨpɨŋo makas(ua) sua na va sua kar~ɾiin.
S.TRANSL: 要去想,他的話原來是那樣.
Remember that, his words are like that.

S.FORM: Cuma Mu'u misaa manasi tavarʉ'ʉ kamu pacʉpʉngcʉpʉng nuari.
S.PHON: ʦuma muʔu misaa manasi tavar~ɾɨʔɨ kamu paʦɨpɨŋʦɨpɨŋ nuar~ɾi.
S.FORM: Cuma Mu'u misaa manasi tavarʉ'ʉ kamu pacʉpʉngcʉpʉng nuari.
S.PHON: ʦuma muʔu misaa manasi tavar~ɾɨʔɨ kamu paʦɨpɨŋʦɨpɨŋ nuar~ɾi.
S.TRANSL: Mu'u叔叔說的事,未來你們才可以記住.
Then you can understand the words Uncle Mu'u said in the future.
